name: employee-system
description: NodeJS AWS Lambda Employee Management System with Terraform, Step Functions, MongoDB and GitHub Actions

scripts.zip:login: cd lambdas/login && zip -r ../../login.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.zip:validateJwt: cd lambdas/validateJwt && zip -r ../../validateJwt.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.zip:createEmployee: cd lambdas/createEmployee && zip -r ../../createEmployee.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.zip:updateEmployee: cd lambdas/updateEmployee && zip -r ../../updateEmployee.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.zip:uploadImage: cd lambdas/uploadImage && zip -r ../../uploadImage.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.zip:seedAdmin: cd lambdas/seedAdmin && zip -r ../../seedAdmin.zip index.js package.json node_modules
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run install:login && npm run zip:login && npm run install:validateJwt && npm run zip:validateJwt && npm run install:createEmployee && npm run zip:createEmployee && npm run install:updateEmployee && npm run zip:updateEmployee && npm run install:uploadImage && npm run zip:uploadImage && npm run install:seedAdmin && npm run zip:seedAdmin
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run terraform:init && npm run terraform:validate && npm run terraform:apply
